channel.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Mar 8th - Mar 14th, 2021
item.description:
Components

  • antd-group-sliderstars2 - A group of sliders that help input data with multiple ranges & description. Have data sync between sliders to improve UX, avoid accidental missing range during inputing range data.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Apr 20th - Apr 26th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

  • Antd-Pro-Generator for VS Codestars9 Generate Service/Mock/Model from Swagger2.0 or OpenApi3.x docs for Ant Design Pro.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Apr 13th - Apr 19th, 2020
item.description:
Blazor

  • Blazorisestars1.9k - AntDesign support for Blazorise and Blazor Demo

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Mar 23rd - Mar 29th, 2020
item.description:
Theming

  • dynamic-antd-themestars182 - A simple plugin to dynamic change ant-design theme whether less or css.

    • Icons

  • Material Design Iconsstars16 Material Design Icons for Ant Design

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Feb 24th - Mar 1st, 2020
item.description:
Blazor

  • ant-design-blazorstars3.3k - Ant Design of Blazor(both Server-side and WebAssembly).

item.description:

  • vscode-antd-rushstars76 - Rush to Ant Design in VS Code

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Jan 13th - Jan 19th, 2020

  • Zakustars51 - JSX-based UI editor, easy way to build page and generate antd code.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Dec 23rd - Dec 29th, 2019

Tools

  • formik-antdstars466 - Declarative bindings for the popular form state management library Formik.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Jul 22nd - Jul 28th, 2019

Boilerplates

  • The Green Mealstars77 - Next.js, PostgreSQL demo app written in TypeScript.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Jul 15th - Jul 21st, 2019
item.description:
Theming

Themes

  • ant-design-aliyun-themestars242 - Aliyun console theme variables of Ant Design.
  • ant-design-dark-themestars438 - Dark theme variables of Ant Design.
  • ant-dark-themestars14 - Dark theme variables of Ant Design.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Jul 1st - Jul 7th, 2019
item.description:
React Hooks

  • Sunflower(🌻)stars447 Collection of React Hooks returning component of antd.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Mar 18th - Mar 24th, 2019
item.description:
Non-JavaScript Libraries

  • syn-antd - Ant Design wrapper for ClojureScript and Reagentstars4.2k using shadow-cljs with tree-shaking support. As with other ClojureScript libraries, it cross-compiles to JavaScript.

    • Boilerplates

  • ScaffoldHub.io - Generate fullstack React + Ant Design applications with MongoDB, SQL or Firebase Firestore.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Feb 25th - Mar 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Boilerplates

  • Create React App + Ant Designstars508 - Use antd in create-react-app without ejecting

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Dec 31st - Jan 6th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

  • Generator Antd Prostars34 - An easy way to build your Ant Design Pro application.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Nov 19th - Nov 25th, 2018
item.description:
Design Tools and Resources

  • Ant Design Library - Ant Design Axure Library

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Nov 12th - Nov 18th, 2018
item.description:
Components

  • antd-password-input-strengthstars78 - AntD Input component with password-strength indicator.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Nov 5th - Nov 11th, 2018
item.description:
Other

  • Ant Design of Ember - Enterprise-class UI framework based on Ant Design and Emberjs.
  • Fable Ant Designstars23 - Ant Design bindings for Fable Elmish.

    • Angular

  • ng-alain - ng-zorro-antd admin panel front-end framework.
  • NG-ZORRO-Mobilestars720 - Ant Design Mobile of Angular

    • Vue.js

  • ant-design-vuestars14.3k - Ant Design of Vue.js 2.5.0+.
  • antuestars255 - A set of enterprise-class Vue UI components, following the Ant Design specification completely.
  • vue-antd-adminstars2.3k - Ant Design Pro's implementation with Vue

    • Icons

  • Official Ant Design Iconsstars511

    • Design Tools and Resources

  • Kitchen - Sketch Plugin with suites of functions to enhance designers
  • Ant UX - Sitemap templates for ux design in OG, Sketch, Axure, Affinity, Adobe XD.
  • Ant Design Design Resources - Sketch Symbols

    • Boilerplates

  • Ant Design Pro - An out-of-box UI solution for enterprise applications 🔥🔥🔥
  • Scaffold Market - scaffolds and boilerplates using Ant Design
  • Meteor Antd Boilerplatestars9 - A basic social network built using Antd and Meteor. Example
  • React-PWA, PawJS and AntDesignstars10 - A pluggable boilerplate with SEO, PWA, SSR, Skeleton, Placeholders, etc. as some of its many features.

    • Theming

  • antd-theme-generatorstars261 - A simple script to generate theme specific less file which can be used in any environment.
  • antd-theme-webpack-pluginstars303 - A webpack plugin to generate your custom theme file.

    • Components

  • antd-amplify-reactstars53 - A collection of Ant Design component for Aws Amplify for Authentication

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Oct 29th - Nov 4th, 2018
item.description:
Related Projects

  • Ant Motion - Efficient motion design solutions that complies with Ant Design Visual specification with React implementation.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Oct 15th - Oct 21st, 2018
item.description:
Components

  • ngx-recursive-formstars32 - Angular recursive form based on json input built with Ant Design.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Sep 10th - Sep 16th, 2018
item.description:
Components

  • antd-table-infinitystars260 - An infinite scroll component based on antd table that supports virtual scrolling & high-performance

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Jul 30th - Aug 5th, 2018
item.description:
Boilerplates

  • Typescript React With Mobx Starterstars293 - a starter-template with typescript, react, mobx, antd and webpack).

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Jul 23rd - Jul 29th, 2018
item.description:
Components

  • React Gridstars10 [Deprecated] - Grid React UI Component based on Ant Design.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Jun 4th - Jun 10th, 2018
item.description:
Icons

  • Ant Design Iconsstars57 - The premium icon font from Ant Design and Ant Design Mobile.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Nov 27th - Dec 3rd, 2017
item.description:
Electron

  • StarCabinetstars400 - Github Stars-based cross-platform tool based on React, Electronand and Ant Design.
  • Nowastars203 - A webpack based front-end plug-in scaffolding and development solution.

    • Resources

  • Ant Design - An Enterprise-class UI design language and React-based implementation.
  • Ant Design Pro - An out-of-box UI solution for enterprise applications 🔥🔥🔥

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Aug 21st - Aug 27th, 2017
item.description:
Angular

  • NG-ZORROstars7.5k - Ant Design of Angular.

    • Components

  • antd-data-tablestars118 - A component that combines antd's Table and Form to do the search, display, and operating jobs for data.

    • Boilerplates

  • Ng-Alainstars4.1k - Angular Admin UI built on Ant Design (with ng-zorro-antd).

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Aug 7th - Aug 13th, 2017
item.description:
Boilerplates

  • CRA-TS-Antdstars108 - Create-React-App + TypeScript + Ant-Design (without Eject).

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Jun 26th - Jul 2nd, 2017
item.description:
Non-JavaScript Libraries

  • Antizerstars242 - Ant Design library for ClojureScript, an immutable, functional language that cross-compiles to JavaScript.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design May 15th - May 21st, 2017
item.description:
Boilerplates

  • Aspnet Core Antd Boilerplatestars20 - Server Side Rendering with Asp.net core.
  • React Redux Universalstars17 - Universal/Isomorphic boilerplate using react router 4 and webpack 2.5+. All latest packages.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Mar 27th - Apr 2nd, 2017
item.description:
Boilerplates

  • Dva Ant Admin - A front-end boilerplate built with Dva, Ant-Design

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Mar 13th - Mar 19th, 2017
item.description:
Applications

  • Productivity Applicationstars234 - Kanban style, Trello inspired Productivity application built using React, Ant Design and other fantastic modules.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Feb 20th - Feb 26th, 2017
item.description:
Tools

  • Antd Snippets for VS Code

    • Components

  • react-lz-editorstars900 - An open source rich react editor based on draft-Js and ant design.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Feb 13th - Feb 19th, 2017
item.description:
Articles

  • Styling React Applications with Ant.Design
  • Finding a User Interface library

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Jan 9th - Jan 15th, 2017
item.description:
Tools

  • Dva Clistars972 - Create Ant Design projects based on Dva.jsstars15.6k, a lightweight front-end framework based on Redux and React and inspired by Elm and Choostars6.6k.
  • Antd Initstars817 - Ant Design boilerplate generator (for demo only, use dva-cli).

    • Boilerplates

  • Antd Adminstars8.3k - A admin dashboard application demo built upon Ant Design and Dva.js.
  • Dva Antd Starterstars28 - Get started with Dva.js and Ant Design.
  • Dva Antd Mobile Starterstars116 - Get started with Dva.js and Ant Design mobile.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Nov 28th - Dec 4th, 2016
item.description:
Boilerplates

  • React SPAstars520 - Building SPA with React, Router, ES6, Fetch, Babel, Webpack, Npm, MockJs, FontAwesome, AnimateCSS, Ant Design, LESS and jQuery.
  • React Antd Starterstars104 - This project is designed to develop website/web apps using Ant Design and Redux.
  • React Redux Antd Starterstars90 - Front-end boilerplate built with React, Redux and Ant Design.
  • Koastars64 - Example app to build Admin UI built with React, Ant Design and Koa.
  • Star Adminstars77 - Demo app built with React, Ant Design, Redux, React-router, Webpack and Babel.
  • React Start Kitstars107 - SPA Boilerplate built with React, Webpack, ES6+, Redux, Router, Babel, Express, Ant Design.
  • React Boilerplatestars20 - React Admin front-end boilerplate built with Ant Design.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Nov 21st - Nov 27th, 2016
item.description:
Components

  • Antd Kitstars35 - Advanced Ant Design components.

    • Applications

  • Eeveestars168 - Based on Github page online editing blog platform. The project is based React, Ant Design and GitHub API.

item.title: websemantics/awesome-ant-design Oct 17th - Oct 23rd, 2016
item.description:
Boilerplates

  • React Adminstars583 - React Admin UI built on Ant Design (username: admin, password: 123456).
  • React Reduxstars409 - React Redux for CMS/Enterprise class apps (ERP/Admin) built with Ant Design.
  • Webbfstars368 - Java demo that uses Maven to build the backend with Spring, Spring MVC and Mybatis. React, Reflux, Eebpack, jQuery, React-bootstrap and Ant Design.
  • React Redux Introstars33 - Demo app built with Ant Design and can be configured to initialize a Redux dependencies.
  • TODO MVCstars10 - Todo list built with React and Ant Design.
  • CL Reactstars179 - Based on Ant Design front-end framework structures for enterprise back-office software.

    • Related Projects

  • Grammar of Graphics - Pure javascript, powerful semantic graph generation tool for big data which provides a set of graphical syntax that lets users build with simple syntax a myriad of charts and integrates a large number of statistical tools, (Read morestars127).
  • Ant Visualization - Professional data visualization specification that aims to put several years of valuable data pattern group work in the process of exploring data visualization to share with all people who need data visualization theory. AntV consists of few parts, data, design specifications and rules for use of the chart, (Read morestars127).
  • Ant UX - Make a sitemap template for UX design using Omnigraffle, Sketch or Axure. This is a library which assists designers to define, refine and finalize the inter-page logic of their products.

    • Vue.js

  • Vue.js Beautystars2.1k - Beautiful UI components build with Vue.js and Ant Design.
  • Vue.js Ant UIstars33 - Ant Design UI components built in Vue.js.
  • Ant Design Vuestars9 - Vue.js version of Ant Design.

    • Resources

  • Ant Design Mobile - Configurable Mobile UI specification and React-based implementation.
  • Ant Design of React - Graceful UI components out of the box, based on React.
  • Ant Design SVG Icons - Project to transform regular icon fonts into SVG format, supporting Ant Design icon fonts.

    • Tools

  • Antd Tools - Very useful list of tools for Ant Design to create documentation, create new components, build tools and many more.
  • Antd Tools Docs - Documentations for Ant Tools.
  • iConfig Ant Designstars7 - Boilerplate for quickly getting a new project up and running with a few useful transforms.
